# README

Yandell R/qtl2shiny project.

[Articles for
`qtl2shiny`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/articles/)

### What is this repository for?

- Code to create shiny interface for
  [R/qtl2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2).
- Version 1.1 Guides:
  - [R/qtl2shiny Screen
    Shots](http://pages.stat.wisc.edu/~yandell/software/qtl2shiny/screenshots.md)
  - [R/qtl2shiny User
    Guide](https://github.com/byandell/qtl2shiny/blob/master/vignettes/UserGuide.Rmd)
  - [R/qtl2shiny Developer
    Guide](https://github.com/byandell/qtl2shiny/blob/master/vignettes/DeveloperGuide.Rmd)
  - [R/qtl2shiny Data
    Preparation](https://github.com/byandell/qtl2shiny/blob/master/vignettes/qtl2shinyData.Rmd)
- Version 1.4 Guides:
  - [Shiny Module
    Organization](https://github.com/byandell-sysgen/qtl2shiny/blob/master/inst/doc/module.md)
  - [Workflow with Recla
    Data](https://github.com/byandell-sysgen/qtl2shiny/blob/master/inst/doc/Recla.md)

### What has been done

- created [Shiny](https://shiny.rstudio.com) interface for
  [R/qtl2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2) data
  - handles multiple phenotypes and multiple projects
  - creates plots and scans on the fly
  - uses Shiny modules and dashboard
- organized in package R/qtl2shiny
- depends on related packages
  - [R/qtl2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2)
  - [R/qtl2ggplot2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2ggplot)
  - [R/qtl2fst](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2fst)
  - [R/qtl2pattern](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2pattern)
  - [R/qtl2mediate](https://github.com/byandell/qtl2mediate)
  - [R/intermediate](https://github.com/byandell/intermediate)

### What are open development issues

Major issues

- speed up access
- save intermediate calculations that are reused
- make sure multiple taxa work smoothly

Minor issues

- shiny
  - reveal plots more (settings on sidebar? tabs?)
  - user save settings for quick replay of shiny
- markdown
  - flexdashboard for Rmd to create dynamic reports
  - link Rmd and shiny documents
- genes
  - GeneRegion and GeneExon for multiple traits giving different results
  - upgrade these to use `plot_genes`
- scans
  - multiple traits now use superset of covariates
  - fixed for Scan1Plot; need to do same for Scan1SNP and possibly
    elsewhere
- SNP/Gene Action
  - panel appears not to work at all
- reset
  - reset buttons when new dataset (i.e. to Genome Scan)
- winpar
  - get `chr:pos` from winParApp for user selection
  - better rationalize how this changes when classes change

### Contribution guidelines

- Writing tests
- Code review
- Other guidelines

### Who do I talk to?

- [Brian Yandell](http://github.com/byandell)
- [Karl Broman](http://github.com/kbroman)
  - [R/qtl2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=qtl2)

### Installation

R/qtl2 is now available on CRAN, as are R/qtl2ggplot and R/qtl2pattern.

You first need to install the
[devtools](https://cran.r-project.org/package=devtools) package, plus a
variety of package dependencies. (Additional, secondary dependencies
will also be installed). The code below ensures that packages, including
`devtools`, are only installed if they are missing or have been updated
on `CRAN` or `GitHub`.

    # Install `devtools` if not already installed
    tryCatch(find.package("devtools"), error = function(e) install.packages("devtools"))
    # Install qtl2shiny dependencies from CRAN if not already installed.
    devtools::install_cran(c("devtools", "yaml", "jsonlite", "data.table"))
    devtools::install_cran(c("RcppEigen", "RSQLite"))
    devtools::install_cran(c("tidyverse", "RColorBrewer", "fst", "shiny"))
    devtools::install_cran(c("shinydashboard", "grid", "gridBase", "gdata"))
    devtools::install_cran(c("GGally", "Rcpp", "mnormt", "corpcor", "plotly"))
    # Install other qtl2 packages from CRAN.
    devtools::install_cran(c("qtl2", "qtl2fst", "qtl2ggplot", "qtl2pattern"))
    # Install byandell packages from GitHub.
    devtools::install_github("byandell-sysgen/intermediate")
    devtools::install_github("byandell-sysgen/qtl2mediate")
    devtools::install_github("byandell-sysgen/qtl2shiny")

To install `qtl2shiny` with vignettes (takes a bit longer):

    devtools::install_github("byandell/qtl2shiny", build_vignettes=TRUE)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`comediator_region()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/comediator_region.md)
  : Create list with mediators in region
- [`comediator_type()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/comediator_type.md)
  : Get mediators of same type as pheno_name
- [`dipParApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/dipParApp.md)
  [`dipParServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/dipParApp.md)
  [`dipParInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/dipParApp.md)
  [`dipParUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/dipParApp.md)
  [`dipParOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/dipParApp.md)
  : Shiny Diplotype Parameter module
- [`downloadApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/downloadApp.md)
  [`downloadServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/downloadApp.md)
  [`downloadInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/downloadApp.md)
  [`downloadUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/downloadApp.md)
  : Download App
- [`geneExonApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneExonApp.md)
  [`geneExonServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneExonApp.md)
  [`geneExonInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneExonApp.md)
  [`geneExonOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneExonApp.md)
  : Shiny Genes and Exons with nearby SNPs module
- [`geneRegionApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneRegionApp.md)
  [`geneRegionServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneRegionApp.md)
  [`geneRegionInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneRegionApp.md)
  [`geneRegionOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/geneRegionApp.md)
  : Shiny Genes in SNP Region module
- [`genoApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoApp.md)
  [`genoServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoApp.md)
  [`genoInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoApp.md)
  [`genoOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoApp.md)
  : Shiny Allele App
- [`genoDataApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoDataApp.md)
  [`genoDataServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoDataApp.md)
  [`genoDataInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoDataApp.md)
  [`genoDataOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoDataApp.md)
  : Shiny Genotype Data App
- [`genoEffectApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoEffectApp.md)
  [`genoEffectServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoEffectApp.md)
  [`genoEffectUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoEffectApp.md)
  [`genoEffectOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoEffectApp.md)
  : Shiny Allele App
- [`genoPlotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoPlotApp.md)
  [`genoPlotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoPlotApp.md)
  [`genoPlotInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoPlotApp.md)
  [`genoPlotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/genoPlotApp.md)
  : Shiny Genotype Data App
- [`get_genes()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/get_genes.md)
  : Get gene in region
- [`hotspot()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspot.md)
  [`summary(`*`<hotspot>`*`)`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspot.md)
  [`subset(`*`<hotspot>`*`)`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspot.md)
  [`cbind(`*`<hotspot>`*`)`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspot.md)
  : Hotspots for phenotypes
- [`hotspotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotApp.md)
  [`hotspotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotApp.md)
  [`hotspotInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotApp.md)
  [`hotspotUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotApp.md)
  [`hotspotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotApp.md)
  : Shiny Hotspot Panel App
- [`hotspotDataApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotDataApp.md)
  [`hotspotDataServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotDataApp.md)
  [`hotspotDataInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotDataApp.md)
  [`hotspotDataOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotDataApp.md)
  : Shiny Hotspot Data App
- [`hotspotPlotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotPlotApp.md)
  [`hotspotPlotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotPlotApp.md)
  [`hotspotPlotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotPlotApp.md)
  : Shiny Hotspot Plot App
- [`hotspotTableApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotTableApp.md)
  [`hotspotTableServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotTableApp.md)
  [`hotspotTableOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/hotspotTableApp.md)
  : Shiny Hotspot Table App
- [`kinshipApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/kinshipApp.md)
  [`kinshipServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/kinshipApp.md)
  [`kinshipOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/kinshipApp.md)
  : Shiny Kinship App
- [`mediateApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateApp.md)
  [`mediateServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateApp.md)

  [`mediateOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateApp.md)
  : Shiny Mediate Panel App
- [`mediateDataApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateDataApp.md)
  [`mediateDataServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateDataApp.md)
  [`mediateDataInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateDataApp.md)
  [`mediateDataUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateDataApp.md)
  [`mediateDataOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediateDataApp.md)
  : Shiny Mediate Data App
- [`mediatePlotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediatePlotApp.md)
  [`mediatePlotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediatePlotApp.md)
  [`mediatePlotInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediatePlotApp.md)
  [`mediatePlotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/mediatePlotApp.md)
  : Shiny Mediate Plot App
- [`patternApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/patternApp.md)
  [`patternServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/patternApp.md)

- [`pheno_region()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/pheno_region.md)
  [`expr_region()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/pheno_region.md)
  : Create list with phenotypes in region
- [`probsApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/probsApp.md)
  [`probsServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/probsApp.md)

  [`projectServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/projectApp.md)

  [`project_subject_model()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/project_classes.md)
  : Project Classes
- [`qtl2shinyApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/qtl2shinyApp.md)
  [`qtl2shinyServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/qtl2shinyApp.md)
  [`qtl2shinyUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/qtl2shinyApp.md)
  : Shiny QTL2 Shiny App
- [`qtl2shiny_plot_theme()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/qtl2shiny_plot_theme.md)
  : QTL2 Shiny Plot Theme
- [`qtl2shiny_theme()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/qtl2shiny_theme.md)
  : QTL2 Shiny UI Theme
- [`read_peaks()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/read_peaks.md)
  [`create_peak_class()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/read_peaks.md)
  : Read Peaks for Phenotypes by Class
- [`read_pheno()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/read_pheno.md)
  : Read Phenotypes
- [`read_project()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/read_project.md)
  : Read Project Data
- [`read_query_rds()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/read_query_rds.md)
  : Read Query for RDS Object
- [`scan1covar()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scan1covar.md)
  : Scan1 for traits with same covariates.
- [`scanApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanApp.md)
  [`scanServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanApp.md)
  [`scanInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanApp.md)
  [`scanOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanApp.md)
  : Shiny Scan Panel App
- [`scanDataApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanDataApp.md)
  [`scanDataServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanDataApp.md)
  [`scanDataInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanDataApp.md)
  [`scanDataOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scanDataApp.md)
  : Shiny Scan Module
- [`scatterApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterApp.md)
  [`scatterServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterApp.md)
  [`scatterInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterApp.md)
  [`scatterOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterApp.md)
  : Shiny Scatter App
- [`scatterPlotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterPlotApp.md)
  [`scatterPlotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterPlotApp.md)
  [`scatterPlotInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterPlotApp.md)
  [`scatterPlotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/scatterPlotApp.md)
  : Shiny Scatter Plot App
- [`setParApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/setParApp.md)
  [`setParServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/setParApp.md)
  [`setParInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/setParApp.md)
  [`setParUI()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/setParApp.md)
  [`setParOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/setParApp.md)
  : Shiny Setup Parameters App
- [`snpFeatureApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpFeatureApp.md)
  [`snpFeatureServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpFeatureApp.md)
  [`snpFeatureOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpFeatureApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP Features in SNP Region module
- [`snpGeneApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpGeneApp.md)
  [`snpGeneServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpGeneApp.md)
  [`snpGeneInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpGeneApp.md)
  [`snpGeneOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpGeneApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP Gene App
- [`snpListApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpListApp.md)
  [`snpListServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpListApp.md)
  [`snpListInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpListApp.md)
  [`snpListOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpListApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP List App
- [`snpPatternApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPatternApp.md)
  [`snpPatternServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPatternApp.md)
  [`snpPatternOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPatternApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP Pattern App
- [`snpPlotApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPlotApp.md)
  [`snpPlotServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPlotApp.md)
  [`snpPlotOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpPlotApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP plot module
- [`snpTableApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpTableApp.md)
  [`snpTableServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpTableApp.md)
  [`snpTableOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/snpTableApp.md)
  : Shiny SNP summary module
- [`triadApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/triadApp.md)
  [`triadServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/triadApp.md)
  [`triadInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/triadApp.md)
  [`triadOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/triadApp.md)
  : Shiny Triad App
- [`winParApp()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/winParApp.md)
  [`winParServer()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/winParApp.md)
  [`winParInput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/winParApp.md)
  [`winParOutput()`](https://byandell-sysgen.github.io/qtl2shiny/reference/winParApp.md)
  : Shiny Window Parameters App
